input: user-item interaction graph and knowledge graph (item-entity graph)
output: ranked list of items per user
backbone: graph neural networks (GNNs) with multi-level cross-view contrastive learning
loss: contrastive loss (InfoNCE) across views + BPR loss (implicit)
key_idea: multi-level cross-view contrastive learning across collaborative, semantic, and structural views to mine self-supervised signals
